last_mile_review.skip_reason: Last-mile two-stage adversarial review skipped on user directive (2026-05-04). Environment lacks node binary required by ollama-companion.mjs and codex-companion.mjs; user authorized 'assume node will be available, proceed.' All 10 pre-impl + 5 post-impl verification questions PASS, make check green at 85.61% coverage, AC-009/010/011 traceability sound.

notes: Story 03 implemented directly by architect-1. Adds the 'Select harness:' single-select step after the frameworks multi-select in both wizard.run() and wizard.run_edit(); the same step is added to detect/wizard_integration.py's run_with_detection and run_edit_with_detection (4 menu insertion points total, lockstep with Story 01's framework-list pattern). Auto-add-to-frameworks behaviour for harness=='opencode' is implemented in a shared wizard._apply_harness_to_answers helper imported by wizard_integration. Boy-scout fix (in scope per Q-PRE-010): apply_detection_to_config was reconstructing Config without `harness=config.harness`, which would silently reset harness on any detect-only update — added the missing kwarg and a regression test. Existing 8 tests in test_wizard_distro.py needed iterator-style side_effect lists extended by one 'claude-code' element each (mechanical fix, original intent preserved). New tests cover AC-009 (3-entry menu, default index 0), AC-010 (auto-add and no-duplicate), AC-011 (run_edit pre-selection), plus parallel coverage for the wizard_integration flows and apply_detection_to_config preservation. make check GREEN; 992 tests; coverage 85.61% (>= 80% gate). In-flight QA (codex:review / ollama:review) skipped: same node-binary unavailability authorized exemption as Stories 01 and 02 (recorded in epic-state.json last_mile_review_skips). Verifier inherits QA responsibility.
